name: Olaplex Holdings Inc. Common Stock
summary: Olaplex Holdings Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells hair care products through a global omnichannel platform including professional, retail, and direct-to-consumer channels, and is headquartered in Santa Barbara, California. The company offers hair care products, including shampoos, conditioners, styling products, and treatments designed to repair, protect, and strengthen all hair types. Their products are primarily sold to professional hair salons, retailers, and consumers through its website.
